headline: Atos Positioned as a Leader in the ISG Provider Lens™ for Intelligent Automation Services, Europe
summary: Press Release Atos Positioned as a Leader in the ISG Provider Lens™ for Intelligent Automation Services, Europe Paris, France – April 7, 2026 – Atos, a global leader of AI-driven digital transformation, announces today it has been named a Leader in Intelligent Automation Services in Europe by Information Services Group (ISG), a leading global research and advisory firm. In this comprehensive evaluation, ISG analyzed more than 35 global providers, with Atos securing a top-tier leadership position
